case_title: RHODES, VELDA vs. BROUSSARD, CHARMAINE et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-03-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-02-1995, CONTINUED TO DEC-05-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
